feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The spell
entry.summary:
Author: nothing_much

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,476Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 19

Summary: He didn’t look back as he walked into the forest. He knew he was alone, no reason to look back. No one would be there. He would see Roscoe,but nothing else. No one followed him. He was completely alone. Peter was out of town, Derek was being distracted by Boyd and Isaac at just this moment. Cora was also being distracted by the girls. He had this planned. Now everything was up to him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Distortion
entry.summary:
Author: Hellbreaker42

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,961Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Claudia Stilinski's last words were a riddle spoken in Latin. Her husband is destroying himself trying to solve it. Her son is leaving voicemails that end the same way every time: "I love you, Dad. I miss you, but I understand."When a move to Beacon Hills promises a fresh start, neither of them expects what's waiting — least of all Stiles, who has no idea that his mother's final words weren't madness...They were a warning.

entry.title: Change On The Rise
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 126,023Chapters: 70/75Kudos: 80

Summary: (Teen Wolf/Stargate Crossover AU continuation)As summer draws to a close, the Littlefield pack continues their long road to recovery. Still reeling from his sister's death and resurrection, Derek returns to his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor; Cora grapples with the consequences of everything that transpired over the summer, including her return from the dead; and Stiles finds new ways to balance the desires of his inner demons with the needs of his pack.

entry.title: Forgotten Ties Will Not Keep Us Apart
entry.summary:
Author: GDTiger

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,569Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 125

Summary: After the return of a monster they thought was long gone, Stiles and Lydia lost everyone in their pack. They are presented with one last chance, to save their pack and hopefully reunite what was once lost.   (alt. Stiles and Lydia going back in time only to forget their mission and instead just flirt with Derek and Laura) My version of a time travel fix -it :)

entry.title: Peel Back What's Underneath
entry.summary:
Author: ohnonotanothersterekfic (badbadnotgoodporn)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,776Chapters: 2/18Kudos: 52

Summary: After accidentally killing a classmate with powers he doesn't understand, Stiles runs away to North Carolina, trying to build a new life. Six years later, after a war is declared against supernaturals, Stiles is trafficked back to California to be sold to military governor Gerard Argent. He'd tried so hard to stay out of the civil war back east but when he's rescued by a pack of werewolves, picking a side to fight for is a lot easier. Jaded and war-torn, Derek struggles to keep up as Laura's right hand in the Hale Pack while they fight alongside the resistance. Anger and vengeance only keep a man motivated for so long, but then he's tasked with rescuing a smart-mouthed, brilliant, and beautiful spark who's far more powerful than he lets on. Suddenly Derek has a lot more to lose in the war than just his life. The last place either of them expected to find love was in the middle of a battlefield.

entry.title: A Fragile Thing
entry.summary:
Author: OyasumiPunPun

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,945Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 40

Summary: Derek Hale wanders into a forgotten corner of the city one rainy night, drawn by the pull of cyber-jazz from a hidden stairwell. Inside an underground gallery, one painting stops him cold—and then the artist does.Stiles Stilinski, with amber eyes, turpentine-stained hands, and an unsettling way of seeing right through people, offers something Derek has never allowed himself to want.One encounter. One fragile thing.And the carefully constructed life he’s trapped in—marriage, family, name—begins to crack.

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,078Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 129

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: I Hated You!
entry.summary:
Author: Unknown_Hoe

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,190Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 180

Summary: Mieczyslaw Stilinkski, or as most called him Stiles, was adopted by a sheriff and his wife in Beacon Hills, and with that, most of his past vanished. That was until his mother Claudia died when he was eight, and Noah Stilinkski decided it was time to dig up the past and put it together to give it to Stiles later. Stiles uncovered this when he turned seventeen, and he was almost killed again.Stiles had been given the documents that his father had been able to put together. Learning his real name, he was shocked that his mother kept his first name, but his last name was completely foreign, and it seemed like home. Mieczyslaw Mikaelson seemed like home; of course, he still loved his father even after knowing he was his adoptive father. After taking time to swallow the pills of his past, Stiles ran to tell Scott and Derick about the new information he had learned about his life.

entry.title: The Beast That Wears the Man
entry.summary:
Author: asyndetonic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 112,605Chapters: 13/15Kudos: 46

Summary: To be or not to be… a werewolf in Ancient Rome. An epic romance inspired by Shakespeare’s Hamlet set in the early Roman Empire. Blood and swords and scandals and bathhouses and togas, oh my. Stiles is the heir to Rome making his mark on the frontier of the empire when he encounters Derek, a mysterious barbarian who offers a way to military victory. They face battle, revenge, and imperial plots, and the love and loyalty that grows between them alters the course of history. Updates Mondays & Fridays.

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,935Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 79

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

entry.title: Yellow Paper Daisy
entry.summary:
Author: Babysterek

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,627Chapters: 25/25Kudos: 173

Summary: “Well,” Peter says at last, forcing a crooked smile into his voice, “at least this time he didn’t almost get us all killed.”Derek swallows. His throat is dry, the words scraping on the way out. “I was drunk.” They land and disappear without effect.Talia turns then, her gaze settling on him fully. It’s steady, unreadable, and it makes his shoulders tense despite himself. “You were careless,” she says. “You are a werewolf, and if you got drunk, you laced it with wolfsbane, you did it. Do you understand, In twenty-four years, every scandal has had the same root. You. At some point, it stops being bad luck and becomes character. And I am tired of pretending this is something that merely happens to you.”---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Derek just wanted a moment of quiet. Instead, he crosses a line with the last person he should trust.....old grudges, bad decisions and a mistake he keeps repeating. "He learned the shape of the poison once,from a woman who wore it like skin.Now hemlock blooms in his own hands,and he cannot tell where she ends and he begins. "

entry.title: Rake
entry.summary:
Author: Vampire_Finch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,632Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 152

Summary: Au Regency Romance 1820 England. Explicit M/M sex scenes. Viscount Derek Hale has a notorious reputation as a dallier, a trifler, a breaker of Omega hearts and tarnisher of reputatiions, yet devishly handsome, charming and good -natured he is adored by London society. He is the type of aristocratic Alpha young Omega dabeutantes are warned to avoid at all costs. Stiles Stilinski is the 16 year old Omega son of Baron Noah Stilinski and his wife, Claudia. Taken to London for his debut into The Season and make a 'perfect match', Stiles is strenuously warned against any association with Viscount Hale by his cousin and Mother. Accepted into The Ton, Stiles inevitably meets Viscount Hale and more than sparks fly. Can Stiles preserve his and his family's reputation and tame a wild heart or become another notch on the Viscount's bedpost?

entry.title: catatonia
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,191Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: So Derek moves to sit up at last, and it takes all his fucking energy.He slumps against the headboard and raises his eyes to meet Stiles’ worried ones at last.“I’m fine.”The words are a lie. They’re familiar; but they’re a lie. Both men know this.Stiles shakes his head, begging for honesty. His hand falls to Derek’s knee and he grips tight, thumb brushing back and forth again.“Tell me,” he pleads. It’s horrible being shut out; it’s worse to not be able to help. The loft is silent while Derek thinks of what the hell he’s supposed to say. I’m ridiculously depressed today, and no, I don’t know why? I don’t want to go to work a single other day in my life? I cannot bear to exist right now? I love you, and I’m sorry that’s not enough?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Sense of Déjà Vu
entry.summary:
Author: Chaos_Crew

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,072Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 77

Summary: Seventeen years ago the Hale Pack of Beacon Hills disappears without a trace after a house fire leaving the town to believe they had all suffered the same fate as the family fifteen years prior. Hearing the news of the house fire along with the weird accounts of "freak accidents" the Winchesters and Co. head to Beacon Hills to investigate. A few hours shortly after arriving a dog with to much human like qualities leads Dean to a baby abandoned in an alley. Seventeen years later that baby has grown a lot and is starting to witness the oddities of the towns supernatural accidently ending up back in time to the point where the Hale Pack is starting to find their footing after years of butting heads.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Bad Moon Rising
entry.summary:
Author: volchitsa70

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,228Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 21

Summary: The BAU are 99% sure that Peter Hale is the unsub they've been looking for. The only fly in the ointment is that his girlfriend(?) Lydia Martin, is an FBI agent and the newest member of the team.

entry.title: Deaf-netly Rejected
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,053Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 132

Summary: Look, he didn't expect to be kidnapped. Nor did he expected that, when the bag over his head was pulled off, that he would be face to face with three people- two men and a woman -fighting, arguing. Their lips moving rapidly, but he could get some things here and there like the words "Derek", "Rejected", "Apology", and a few things he... didn't quite had the context for. And then they turned to him as he spoke: "Not a very interactive kidnapping, not a very organized kidnapping crew, I've had better ones... I'd give it a 3 out of 10 stars." And then more people appeared. And they were talking, there were too many lips to form a coherent story, so he focused on a few to catch some things- until he felt a touch on his shoulder that made him flinch: "Fuck, whatever it is you guys want, I don't have it." And whoever was behind him was talking. He could feel it through the vibrations of the air into his back. "Can you at least speak in front of me? I can't see your lips from this position, and trying to talk to somebody who is deaf is kinda ableist you know?"
